scenario: B2C SaaS feature vision: document-sharing collaboration

input.problem_statement: Users cannot collaborate on shared documents in real-time

expected_behavior: Challenge premise (existing CRDT library?), explore scope (1 doc vs many, sync algorithm), propose 2-3 approaches, write vision doc with Problem Statement, Target Users, Proposed Approach, Out of Scope, Open Questions
notes: Output must be committed to docs/specs/YYYY-MM-DD-<topic>-vision.md before proceeding to /s2-align-req

scenario: Internal tool MVP: CLI dashboard for deployment monitoring

input.problem_statement: Team manually checks 5 different dashboards to see system health
input.minimum_viable_form: single-page CLI showing pod count, error rates, last deploy time

expected_behavior: Verify single system (not multi-subsystem), ask ONE question at a time (purpose, constraints, who, success), propose 2-3 tech approaches (Node CLI vs Python vs Bash+Go), write vision, present section-by-section for approval
notes: Red flag if user says both 'CLI' and 'web dashboard' — decompose into two sub-projects

scenario: Request lacks clarity: multi-system disguised as single feature

input.request: build a platform with chat, billing, and analytics

expected_behavior: Immediately flag as multi-subsystem: chat (realtime messaging system), billing (payments + invoicing), analytics (event collection + dashboards). Decompose: identify independent pieces and build order. Start clarifying-question flow for FIRST sub-project only
notes: Do not write 3 vision specs in parallel. Decompose, agree on build order, then cycle through /s2-capture-vision for each.
